goal: Replace blind free-text model_id entry in the Remediation Model Accounts tab with a checked-in YAML model catalog as source of truth — catalog API, capability-rich UI dropdowns, live Ollama discovery and remote Ollama pull (trigger + progress polling).

phases.goal: YAML model catalog is the parsed/validated source of truth in ampel-core, mapped onto existing ModelCaps — no API/UI yet.
definition_of_done: cargo test -p ampel-core remediation::model_catalog (serde round-trip + default + invalid-YAML fallback)

phases.goal: Catalog + Ollama discovery/pull reachable over HTTP, every call passing existing SSRF + air-gap gates.
definition_of_done: cargo test -p ampel-api model_catalog (air-gap hide external, SSRF reject internal, pull state machine)
reuses validate_model_account SSRF+air-gap, no bespoke copy
no unguarded outbound reqwest in new handler

phases.goal: Catalog-driven Model tab: provider->model dropdown with caps/cost, advanced custom-model escape hatch, Ollama pull-progress flow, fully i18n.
definition_of_done: make test-frontend (catalog dropdown, custom escape hatch, Ollama pull/poll)
new i18n keys across all locales (coverage green)

phases.goal: End-to-end hardening + docs: security gates proven across new surface; feature documented.
definition_of_done: docs explain adding a model + Ollama remote pull

summary: config/models.yaml catalog (claude/gemini/ollama/onnx) + ampel-core remediation::model_catalog: serde structs with #[serde(default)] graceful fallback, embedded DEFAULT_CATALOG_YAML via include_str!, load_catalog() file loader (missing->embedded default, invalid->empty), and CatalogModel::caps() mapping onto existing ModelCaps (modality/egress/output_contract/kind derived from ProviderKind; PerToken cost only when both Decimal prices present). 14 unit tests; clippy -D warnings + rustfmt clean. No API/UI yet.

ampel-api handlers/model_catalog.rs: GET /api/model-catalog (org-aware air-gap filter hides external providers), GET /ollama/tags, POST /ollama/pull + GET /ollama/pull/{id}/status. Ollama endpoints funnel through resolve_ollama_target -> load_authorized_account (authz verbatim from model_accounts) + assert_endpoint_safe (SAME shared SSRF guard, local_only exempt as validate) before any request; reqwest client redirect(none). Pull = background tokio task driving Ollama NDJSON stream into a module-level static PULL_JOBS registry (in-memory, owner-scoped status). Pure PullStatus state machine + air-gap filter + ndjson drain unit-tested (6 tests). bad_gateway(502) ctor added. Adversarial review: SSRF/authz/air-gap all correct; FOLLOW-UP: PULL_JOBS never evicts (slow unbounded growth) — add TTL cleanup in phase 3 or a bead. clippy -D warnings + fmt clean.

Frontend catalog-driven Model tab. New modelCatalog.ts API client + useModelCatalog hooks (catalog, ollama tags, pull, pull-status polling). ModelAccountManager CreateForm: catalog-driven model Select (context/cost/tool-use/egress pills) replacing blind model_id input; Advanced disclosure with free-text custom-model escape hatch (custom wins: modelId = customModelId.trim() || catalogModelId); AccountRow shows resolved caps + Ollama 'Pull model' + polled progress when tag not discovered. i18n: new remediation:modelCatalog.* keys added to EN + propagated to ALL 27 locales; i18n/types.ts regenerated. Verified INDEPENDENTLY: i18n --check-missing exit0, --check --min-coverage 95 exit0, types.ts idempotent, make lint-frontend clean, make test-frontend 909 passed/6 skipped/0 failed (3 new specs). Deviation: Advanced disclosure is a plain aria-expanded button (no shadcn Collapsible dep); select-item badges are spans for valid HTML inside radix ItemText.

Final phase. Integration tests crates/ampel-api/tests/test_model_catalog.rs (Postgres-gated, mirrors test_model_accounts): air-gapped org catalog hides claude/gemini; external-egress ollama account at 169.254.169.254 -> tags 422 (shared SSRF guard, READ-path, account seeded via direct insert since create blocks it); local_only passes guard -> 502 upstream; spendCap persists round-trip (honest — enforcement is worker-side, not fabricated). PULL_JOBS bounded: seq field + NEXT_SEQ AtomicU64 + MAX_PULL_JOBS + evict_over_cap (terminal-first, deterministic) with 2 unit tests. docs/features/MODEL_CATALOG.md (config/models.yaml as source of truth, how to add a model, Ollama discovery+pull, no new env var) + README feature-index link. Verified INDEPENDENTLY incl make format-check (the phase-2 lesson): 8 lib tests pass, integration --no-run compiles, clippy -D warnings clean, format-check clean, markdownlint 0 errors.

Cross-phase optimization: dedup the byte-identical assert_account_access + load_authorized_account helpers that phase 1 replicated verbatim from model_accounts into model_catalog. Made load_authorized_account pub(crate) in model_accounts; model_catalog imports it and drops both local copies (~40 lines) + the now-unused model_provider_account import. Build/clippy -D warnings/8 unit tests/integration --no-run all green; rustfmt clean.

goal: Extend catalog with current mid-2026 best-performing models + hardware-tier/quant schema

phases.goal: Refresh config/models.yaml with verified mid-2026 models + extend CatalogModel schema (params/quantization/min_ram_gb/disk_gb/hardware_tier/community) in ampel-core + API DTO. Backend only.
Surface hardware-tier/quant/community metadata in the Model tab + RAM-tier filter; i18n across all 27 locales.
